---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for NanoSolana
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Category**
- [ ] Trading Strategy
- [ ] Memory System
- [ ] New Channel/Plugin
- [ ] Security
- [ ] CLI/UX
- [ ] Mesh Networking
- [ ] AI/Model Provider
- [ ] Other

**Problem**
What problem does this feature solve?

**Proposed Solution**
How should it work?

**Alternatives Considered**
What other approaches did you consider?

**Financial Impact**
If this is a trading/risk feature, describe:
- How it affects position sizing
- Risk implications
- Backtesting results (if any)
